name: pos-test-automation
description: End-to-end + API + load test suite for a Next.js Distribution POS — Cypress, Playwright, Postman/Newman, k6. Allure + HTML reports, Dockerized, CI-ready. (App source not included.)

scripts.test:api: newman run postman/POS.postman_collection.json -e postman/POS.postman_environment.json -r cli,htmlextra,allure --reporter-htmlextra-export docs/reports/newman.html --reporter-allure-export allure-results
scripts.test:all: npm run test:pw && npm run test:cy && npm run test:api
